import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

state.title: bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs

state.output:
<path>/private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: function titleCase(value) {
2:   return value.toLowerCase().split(' ').map((word) => {
3:     if (word.length === 0) return word
4:     return word[0].toUpperCase() + word.slice(1)
5:   }).join(' ')
6: }
7: 
8: export function formatTitle(value, mode = 'plain') {
9:   if (mode === 'upper') return value.toUpperCase()
10:   if (mode === 'lower') return value.toLowerCase()
11:   if (mode === 'title') return titleCase(value)
12:   return value
13: }

(End of file - total 13 lines)
</content>
